---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in touch"
description-meta: "Contact information for Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.academic-contact}

::: {.contact-header}

## Get in touch

<p class="contact-summary">
Thank you for visiting my website.
</p>

<p class="contact-intro">
I welcome inquiries regarding <strong>research collaborations</strong>,
<strong>student supervision</strong>, <strong>academic visits</strong>,
<strong>seminars</strong>, <strong>conference organization</strong>,
<strong>research funding proposals</strong>, and <strong>consultancy</strong>
in my areas of expertise.
</p>

<p class="contact-intro">
Please feel free to contact me using the information below.
</p>

:::


::: {.contact-information}


::: {.contact-section}

## Office

<div class="office-name">
Dr. Sivalingam S M
</div>

<div class="office-position">
Assistant Professor
</div>

<div class="office-address">
Department of Mathematics<br>
National Institute of Technology Warangal<br>
Warangal – 506004<br>
Telangana, India
</div>

:::


::: {.contact-section}

## Email

::: {.email-list}

<a href="mailto:sivalingam@nitw.ac.in" class="email-row">
<div>
<span class="email-type">Official</span>
<strong>sivalingam@nitw.ac.in</strong>
</div>
</a>

<a href="mailto:siva915544@gmail.com" class="email-row">
<div>
<span class="email-type">Personal</span>
<strong>siva915544@gmail.com</strong>
</div>
</a>

:::

:::


::: {.contact-section .academic-profiles-section}

## Academic Profiles

::: {.academic-profile-list}

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ezCkT1QAAAAJ&hl=en"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   class="academic-profile-row">
<span>Google Scholar</span>
<span class="contact-arrow">↗</span>
</a>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0818-9007"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   class="academic-profile-row">
<span>ORCID</span>
<span class="contact-arrow">↗</span>
</a>

<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sivalingam-S-M"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   class="academic-profile-row">
<span>ResearchGate</span>
<span class="contact-arrow">↗</span>
</a>

<!-- <a href="https://github.com/SivalingamSM"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   class="academic-profile-row">
<span>GitHub</span>
<span class="contact-arrow">↗</span>
</a>  -->

:::

I typically respond to emails within <strong>2–3 working days.</strong>

:::
